overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a stormy rural landscape at night, holding a torch. The character travels along a dirt path past stone walls and through fields before entering a small wooden village.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, with stone walls and trees flanking the route

entered.detail: rough stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
narrow dirt trail winding through the countryside
dense dark forest visible beyond the stone wall
tall grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path at night during a storm, holding a torch that illuminates the way. A stone wall runs along the left side with dense forest beyond, while grassy banks line the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path approaching stone wall gap

events.description: approaching a gap in the stone wall where the path continues through to open fields

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rural path as the stone wall nears its end

entered.detail: distant tree line visible through the approaching gap in the wall
section of stone wall appearing on the right side at the path gap

segments.scene_description: The path continues winding through the stormy landscape as the stone wall on the left approaches a gap. The terrain opens up ahead revealing distant forests, and the wall briefly appears on both sides as the character passes through the gap.

events.description: passing a villager walking in the opposite direction along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open field with tall grass swaying in the storm wind

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing walking past the player in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall golden grass covering the open fields on both sides of the path
rustic wooden fence marking field boundaries in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the stone wall gap, the character enters an open field with tall grass swaying in the storm. A wooden fence appears in the distance on the left, and a villager passes by walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: entering the village area with wooden houses and structures becoming visible

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a small rural village with wooden architecture

entered.detail: traditional wooden village house with steep roof and lit windows
wooden barrels and crates stacked near the building entrance
open clearing within the village surrounded by wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small village with traditional wooden houses, passing wooden fences and entering a clearing. The torch illuminates wooden barrels and building facades as the storm continues overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy rural landscape at night that transitions from a confined forest path into a small wooden village. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path, where a torch illuminates a stone wall and dense forest to the left and grassy banks to the right. As the path winds forward, the stone wall gives way to a gap that opens the terrain toward distant forests before the wall briefly flanks both sides of the trail. The scene then expands into an open field of swaying tall grass where a villager passes in the opposite direction, leading the camera toward a distant wooden fence. Finally, the movement carries the character into a village clearing, passing wooden fences and barrels as the torchlight reveals the facades of traditional wooden houses under the ongoing storm.
